text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: Oh? Preparing for tomorrow's race, I assume?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Gentil! Welcome back!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(Gentildonna. Beautiful and cool, my reliable
roommate.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'll be staying at a hotel near the venue tonight.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text:
…That's quite a lot of luggage for a single
night.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I know! That's why I'm trying to narrow it down
right now…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Shampoo, skincare… things to keep me
entertained on the Shinkansen. Before I knew
it, my bag was completely full…

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. 
…So you're feeling confident, then.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text:
The Oka Sho… the first leg of the Triple
Tiara route. A race that marks the beginning,
and one of great importance.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…?
Yes, that's right!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm really looking forward to it!
I've received so many expectations, too…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
So to live up to everyone's hopes, I'll give it
my all!

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text:
…I see. Then I suppose I may place my
expectations on you as well.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text:
As a senior on the Tiara path… will you show
me a performance worthy of being followed?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'll carry that expectation too… right
alongside the others♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Oka Sho. For a target race,
it's her first time back at Hanshin Racecourse
since the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies.
choice_data_list: (Glad we made it on time this time…)

text_block_list.name: Race Fan A
text_block_list.text: Ah…! It's Buena Vista!

text_block_list.name: Race Fan B
text_block_list.text:
We came to cheer you on today!
Do your best～!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In no time at all, fans begin gathering around
Buena Vista. Of course… the race itself has
drawn a lot of attention, but…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, everyone! I'll do my best
to live up to your expectations―

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
So please keep cheering for me during the
race, too!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Woooooahhh!!
Good luck～!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
We got a lot of cheers. Guess I really have to
give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her so fired up, a faint concern crosses
my mind. It reminds me of the "Specialized
Event Meet" she ran in before we officially
partnered…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…I just realized. I was actually really nervous,
wasn't I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being so emotionally perceptive, she was
overwhelmed by the crowd's energy… and
ended up more tense than she realized.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the crowd's energy is stronger than
ever. Even if she has handled it before… she
might be feeling nervous without noticing.
choice_data_list: Buena… want to take a deep breath?
Buena… want to take a deep breath?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Yeah, you're right. Please.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I speak softly to Buena Vista, helping her focus.
Then, I encourage her to take a deep breath…
choice_data_list: You'll be fine. Today… you can be the star.
You'll be fine. Today… you can be the star.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Your voice… It really does calm me down.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'm okay now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first crown of the Triple Tiara path…
If it's Buena Vista, she can stand at the center
of this year's Tiara races…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: —Yes!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Buena. I've long awaited the day I could face
you like this.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Desire…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Thank you, for seeing me as your rival.
I've been looking forward to it too!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…Yes, that radiance of yours, is like the sun.
And that is precisely why… I must surpass you.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: —As a "Saintess."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Huh?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
I ask that you face me. So that I may begin
my story…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Your story…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
That sounds like so much fun! Thank you for
letting me be part of it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But I don't plan on losing. There are people
waiting for my story, too!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Let's begin, Desire! On the stage of the Tiara,
let's shine with everything we've got!
